2605.19630.title: EMO-BOOST: Emotion-Augmented Audio-Visual Features for Improved Generalization in Deepfake Detection
2605.19630.paper_summary: With every advancement in generative AI models, forensics is under increasing pressure. The constant emergence of new generation techniques makes it impossible to collect data for each manipulation to train a deepfake detection model. Thus, generalizing to deepfakes unseen during training is one of the major challenges in current deepfake detection research. To tackle this challenge, we employ high-level semantic cues and argue that these cues can support low-level focused approaches in generalizing to unseen types of manipulations. In this work, we study emotions as a high-level semantic cue. We propose Emo-Boost, a multimodal deepfake detection framework that fuses an off-the-shelf RGB- and acoustic-focused deepfake detector with our emotion-based deepfake detector EmoForensics. EmoForensics utilises vision and audio emotion recognition modules and models intra- and inter-modal temporal consistency in emotion representations from an audio-visual stream. We found that EmoForensics and the low-level focused method capture complementary signals. Consequently, combining both signals in EmoBoost enhances the average cross-manipulation generalization AUC by 2.1% on FakeAVCeleb.
2605.19630.paper_summary_zh: 隨著生成式 AI 模型的每一次進步，取證面臨著越來越大的壓力。新一代技術的持續出現使得無法為每一種操控收集數據以訓練深偽檢測模型。因此，對於在訓練期間未見過的深偽進行泛化是當前深偽檢測研究中的主要挑戰之一。為了應對這一挑戰，我們運用了高層次的語義線索，並主張這些線索可以支持低層次的聚焦方法在泛化到未見過的操控類型方面的表現。在這項工作中，我們研究情感作為一種高層次的語義線索。我們提出了 Emo-Boost，一個多模態深偽檢測框架，將現成的 RGB 和聲學聚焦的深偽檢測器與我們基於情感的深偽檢測器 EmoForensics 融合。EmoForensics 利用視覺和音頻情感識別模塊，並從音視訊流中建模情感表示的內部和外部模態時間一致性。我們發現 EmoForensics 和低層次聚焦方法捕捉到互補的信號。因此，在 EmoBoost 中結合這兩種信號使得在 FakeAVCeleb 上的平均跨操控泛化 AUC 提升了 2.1%。
2605.19630.author: Aritra Marik et.al.
2605.19630.authors: Aritra Marik, Marcel Klemt, Anna Rohrbach
